use_cases: Primary call-to-action triggers in forms and dialogs
Navigation and menu action buttons throughout applications
Destructive action confirmations with variant styling
Ghost-style secondary actions for inline UI contexts
Accessible interactive elements with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with multiple style variants and sizes, built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling. Provides consistent styling across default, outline, secondary, ghost, destructive, and link variants with proper hover, focus, and disabled states for accessible user interactions.
